description: Docker containerized deployment pipeline with health checks
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[Developer] -->|git push| B[GitHub]
    B --> C[GitHub Actions]
    C --> D[Build Docker Image]
    D --> E[Run Tests in Container]
    E -->|Pass| F[Push to Registry]
    E -->|Fail| G[Notify Team]
    F --> H[Deploy to Kubernetes]
    H --> I{Health Check}
    I -->|Healthy| J[Route Traffic]
    I -->|Unhealthy| K[Rollback]

description: OAuth2 authorization code flow with PKCE
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[User] -->|Click Login| B[App]
    B -->|Redirect + code_challenge| C[Auth Server]
    C -->|Login Form| A
    A -->|Credentials| C
    C -->|Authorization Code| B
    B -->|Code + code_verifier| C
    C -->|Access Token| B
    B -->|API Request with Token| D[Resource Server]
    D -->|Protected Data| B

description: Event-driven CQRS architecture with event sourcing
mermaid_code:
flowchart LR
    A[Client] --> B[Command Handler]
    B --> C[Domain Model]
    C --> D[Event Store]
    D --> E[Event Bus]
    E --> F[Read Model Projector]
    F --> G[Query Database]
    A --> H[Query Handler]
    H --> G

description: ML model training and serving pipeline
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[Raw Data] --> B[Data Preprocessing]
    B --> C[Feature Engineering]
    C --> D[Train/Val/Test Split]
    D --> E[Model Training]
    E --> F[Hyperparameter Tuning]
    F --> G{Meets Threshold?}
    G -->|Yes| H[Model Registry]
    G -->|No| E
    H --> I[Model Serving API]
    I --> J[Monitoring]

description: Distributed cache with write-through and cache invalidation
mermaid_code:
flowchart TD
    A[Client] --> B{Cache Hit?}
    B -->|Yes| C[Return Cached Value]
    B -->|No| D[Query Database]
    D --> E[Store in Cache]
    E --> F[Return Value]
    G[Write Request] --> H[Write to Database]
    H --> I[Invalidate Cache Entry]
    I --> J[Broadcast Invalidation]
    J --> K[Other Cache Nodes]

description: Strategy design pattern with multiple algorithm implementations
FastAPI dependency injection with database session and auth
Event sourcing aggregate with domain events
Payment processing with fraud detection and retry
mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant U as User
    participant API as Payment API
    participant FD as Fraud Detector
    participant PG as Payment Gateway
    participant DB as Database
    U->>API: POST /charge {amount, card}
    API->>FD: Check fraud risk
    FD-->>API: risk_score: 0.1
    alt Low Risk
        API->>PG: Process payment
        PG-->>API: transaction_id
        API->>DB: Save transaction
        API-->>U: 200 OK
    else High Risk
        API-->>U: 403 Forbidden
    end

description: Microservice saga pattern for order fulfillment
mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant O as Order Service
    participant I as Inventory Service
    participant P as Payment Service
    participant N as Notification Service
    O->>I: Reserve inventory
    I-->>O: Reserved OK
    O->>P: Charge payment
    alt Payment Success
        P-->>O: Payment OK
        O->>N: Send confirmation
        N-->>O: Notified
    else Payment Failed
        P-->>O: Payment Failed
        O->>I: Release inventory
        I-->>O: Released
        O->>N: Send failure notice
    end

description: WebSocket real-time collaboration with operational transform
mermaid_code:
sequenceDiagram
    participant C1 as Client 1
    participant S as Server
    participant C2 as Client 2
    C1->>S: WebSocket connect
    C2->>S: WebSocket connect
    C1->>S: Operation: insert at pos 5
    S->>S: Apply OT transform
    S-->>C1: Ack operation
    S-->>C2: Broadcast transformed op
    C2->>S: Operation: delete at pos 3
    S->>S: Transform against C1 op
    S-->>C1: Broadcast transformed op
    S-->>C2: Ack operation
